Spider Venom Sac  
 

Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Spider Venom Sac
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:A Spider Venom Sac
Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 10:20:46
Page Updated:Wed Jan 21st, 2026

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 1pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 10

Quest Name

Uploaded January 27th, 2026 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
to Clarify...
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2022 at 2:13 AM Rating: Decent
Ahmidas
Scholar
21 posts
if you are on the Quest Desert Crawl, given by Castlen Drewe, in PoK. You can only get credit for the Spider Venom Sac by looting it yourself from a desert Tarantula or a dune tarantula in North Ro ONLY. you will not get credit for buying it off Baz... or from looting it off anything else in any other zone.
it is an Uncommon or Rare drop, so don't give up you will eventually get it.
Good Luck!

Edited, Mar 6th 2022 3:17am by Ahmidas
▲ Page top
Farming for 'Desert Crawl' Quest
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2012 at 7:13 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1606090662825
5 posts
Turns out you have to get the venom sac from those damn dune spiders in North Ro. >.> Fuuuuuuuuu-

If you have other purposes for them, you'll have better luck farming this in the Commonlands; I found mine at 149.69, 385.01, 121.36 on a giant spider; I also saw a spider at the small tower guarded by two skeletons and another at the plagued huts.

Or you might just want to buy them from the Cleric/Paladin spell merchant in Crescent Reach... he/she was selling about 10 when I got there to dump my vender trash.

Edited, Apr 2nd 2012 9:29pm by Irrintra

Edited, Apr 2nd 2012 9:33pm by Irrintra
▲ Page top
Farming for 'Desert Crawl' Quest
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2021 at 12:44 AM Rating: Decent
henry0918
Scholar
34 posts
lol. yes ,, desert crawling quest
can't believe I burn over 3 hours on this quest
the reward are totally no justified for the time cost of this

its a sandworm cloak with + 3 sta + 2 AGI

I ended up buying the sac directly from the bazaar for 50 pp
I am on FV server

ok I just tested buying spider sac doesn't work it has to be dropped from the spider by your kill
Edited, Aug 11th 2021 1:52am by henry0918

Edited, Aug 11th 2021 3:26am by henry0918
▲ Page top
Farming for 'Desert Crawl' Quest
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2012 at 10:03 PM Rating: Good
Oxgoad
1,738 posts
Are you sure about that? There's only one item with this name. Usually when there's a special "quest" version, it will have a separate entry in the Zam database. Looking at the quest instructions (bare, though they are) it seems you do have to kill five of the dune spiders in addition to turning in the sac. So perhaps you missed that step? However, it is possible, I suppose. Some of the Crescent Reach quests only credit loots once you have accepted the quest (so my preliminary hoarding of spider eggs was for naught). But I figured I would check. Cheers.
▲ Page top
Fouind of Large Wooly Spider

# Feb 17 2005 at 12:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591824163752
4 posts
As I've grown older in the days and finally had my chance to raid - this old epic finally was finished after 70 years... err... levels.

This really drops off a "A large spider" not a "a giant spider..." (This is referring to EC not anywhere else though.)

Well I retake that back, it does... however not as quickly.

Jaquo "Da'Jester" Shiffon
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=1128841

Edited, Thu Feb 17 00:31:57 2005
▲ Page top
Eastern Plains of Karana
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2004 at 9:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781754598
22 posts
Got 4 of these in 35 mins while farming Spider Silks in East Karana. Go to the hill in the north east side of zone, just above the camp/farm. I was pulling Crag Spiders from the hill (was getting 3 to 7 silks each kill too).
Beware the wandering and Named Hill Giants as you wont see them coming over the hill.

AMKCarl
▲ Page top
Everfrost
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2004 at 3:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798315585
51 posts
Yes they drop off the wooly spiders in everfrost. I have looted several of them. A fairly rare drop, but they are out there. I got mine off of large and giant wooly spiders. Never seen one drop off the spiderlings or the Gigi spiders.
▲ Page top
spiders
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2003 at 4:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778050346
1 post
im pretty sure these drop off the giant spiders in everfrost too
▲ Page top
RE: spiders
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2003 at 3:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791808425
3 posts
I was also told this by several chars who claimed to have got their sac from these - BUT (see post below/lower down) I tried to get a drop from them (in between getting ganged up on by 'passing' snow leopards and orcs) and only got ichor, silks and occasional 'barbarian meat' - so must be at least as rare a drop as in W. Karana - I eventually got mine from WK via my ranger char and the lovely 'shared bank' spaces provided - in my mind therefore the question of if Wooly spids in EF drop venom sacs is still unresolved til someone definitively posts here to say that's where they got theirs
▲ Page top
RE: spiders
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2004 at 3:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800124237
10 posts
they drop off them... i got lucky and got it to drop in one kill. peeps were also spaming occ every 5 damn minutes trying to sell them for like 1pp (ok yes thats not a lot but if you are doing newbie armor odds are you dont have 1 pp to begin with. started a new char on a new server so had zippo in the bank)

needed for shammy armour quest
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2003 at 8:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791808425
3 posts
for the breastplate (last piece I have to do) - prob is that Western Karana 'Giant Spiders' it seems to be a rare drop ... lots of egg sacks but no blinking venom....not around in any of the shops either. Add to that the fact I have no map for this area and bandits abound (at least at night) and I'm gettting a mite frustated! Doesn't list them here but I'm hoping if I kill enuff large wooly spiders in everfrost MAYBE they also drop.... *sigh* I suspect the gigantic wooly spiders may have em but I need quite a few more levels b4 I try taking them on
▲ Page top
Used in poisons
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 9:58 PM Rating: Decent
EnvyEyes
133 posts
I don't know of any quests for these, but they are used to make low-level rogue poisons. I believe they trivial in the high teens for the Make Poison skill.
